message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Consent noted, checking Task 7 completion status">
Thanks Lea, consent noted. And yes -- Tasks 8, 9, and 20 (edit) are independently blocked by 7 only, not by each other. Once 7 lands, they can be worked in any order. In practice the mob will do them sequentially, but the independence means we can reorder based on what feels right without breaking dependencies.

Quick question: is Task 7 actually fully done? The team lead was just asking for the green code to be committed and pushed. Has that happened yet?
</teammate-message>

input.content: Yes, Task 7 is fully done. Committed and pushed across three commits: `6c5336c`, `d325a52`, `3404843`. All 53 tests pass (25 unit + 28 integration). Branch is up to date with origin, working tree is clean for CSS. We're now on Task 9 (delete) and Task 20 (edit).
input.summary: Task 7 fully done and pushed, 53 tests pass
